name: @aliran/react-native
description: Aliran React Native binding — Bare worklet host + drop-in <AliranVideo> on react-native-video
comment: Ships TypeScript source — Metro consumes it directly (RN CLI's default sourceExts include ts/tsx). No native code of its own: react-native-bare-kit provides the worklet runtime and react-native-video the player. The host app supplies the worklet bundle (bare-pack output; see client/backend). The react-native peer stays '*' on purpose: TV apps install it as an npm alias of react-native-tvos, whose prerelease versions fail any strict semver range (ERESOLVE) — with those, install with --legacy-peer-deps.
